criteria.value: delta_w = lr * error * feature; delta_b = lr * error

criteria.name: source mature command supports explicit mature_timestep
criteria.rule: parity run uses explicit due_timestep to avoid timer-race false failures

criteria.name: source controller exposes returned due_timestep
criteria.rule: hardware parity can mature exactly the pending event it scheduled

criteria.name: source native context, route, and memory command constants exist
criteria.rule: custom runtime must expose native context plus memory-route state primitives

criteria.name: source native context write/read handlers use bounded C slots
criteria.rule: context state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: source native keyed route write/read handlers exist
criteria.rule: keyed route state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: source native keyed memory write/read handlers exist
criteria.rule: memory/working state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: source native keyed memory-route schedule forms feature on chip
criteria.rule: host must send key+cue, while the runtime retrieves context+route+memory slots by key and computes the scalar feature

criteria.name: source task loop can score pre-update predictions
criteria.rule: task micro-loop must evaluate the decision before credit updates the readout

criteria.name: source task loop increments decision counter
criteria.rule: minimal task loop must count decisions separately from rewards

criteria.name: source pending horizons do not store future target
criteria.rule: delayed-credit target must arrive at maturation, not be hidden in the pending record

criteria.name: bundle mature command supports explicit mature_timestep
criteria.rule: parity run uses explicit due_timestep to avoid timer-race false failures

criteria.name: bundle native context, route, and memory command constants exist
criteria.rule: custom runtime must expose native context plus memory-route state primitives

criteria.name: bundle native context write/read handlers use bounded C slots
criteria.rule: context state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: bundle native keyed route write/read handlers exist
criteria.rule: keyed route state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: bundle native keyed memory write/read handlers exist

criteria.name: bundle native keyed memory-route schedule forms feature on chip
criteria.rule: host must send key+cue, while the runtime retrieves context+route+memory slots by key and computes the scalar feature

criteria.name: bundle task loop can score pre-update predictions
criteria.rule: task micro-loop must evaluate the decision before credit updates the readout

criteria.rule: minimal task loop must count decisions separately from rewards

criteria.name: bundle pending horizons do not store future target
criteria.rule: delayed-credit target must arrive at maturation, not be hidden in the pending record

reference.equation: chip feature=context_slot_lookup(key)*route_slot_lookup(key)*memory_slot_lookup(key)*visible_cue; schedule prediction=w*feature+bias; keep pending across gap; mature oldest with target; w+=lr*(target-prediction)*feature; b+=lr*(target-prediction)

summary.claim_boundary: Prepared source bundle only; no hardware task micro-loop evidence until returned run-hardware artifacts pass.
summary.next_step_if_passed: Run the emitted EBRAINS command and ingest returned files.
summary.what_i_need_from_user: Upload the generated cra_422ae folder to EBRAINS/JobManager and run the emitted command; download returned files after completion.
